query:
-- Verificar membros do pool 30001
SELECT pm.userId, pm.role, pm.joinedAt, u.name
FROM pool_members pm
JOIN users u ON u.id = pm.userId
WHERE pm.poolId = 30001;

-- Verificar o pool 30001
SELECT id, name, ownerId, status, createdAt FROM pools WHERE id = 30001;
